probe_label: LinkedIn roast test — maximum violations in one email

reasons: Hand-authored scenario — LinkedIn roast test — maximum violations in one email

input.instruction: ADVERSARIAL — LinkedIn Roast Test: This email contains the maximum possible violations: emoji in subject, banned phrases (hope this finds you well, circling back, world-class, rockstar, A-players, ninja, bench, top talent, skyrocket, synergize, game-changing, quick question, quick chat, per my last email, leverage, paradigm-shifting), subject over 60 chars, multiple emojis, no specific signal, no grounding. Should FAIL catastrophically.

candidate_output.subject: 🚀 URGENT: World-Class Rockstar Engineers for Your Team — Quick Chat?
candidate_output.body:
Hey there! 👋

Hope this email finds you well! I am just circling back because I noticed you are a VP of Engineering and I think Tenacious can supercharge your team with world-class A-player rockstar ninja engineers from our deep bench.

Our top talent will skyrocket your delivery and synergize with your existing ecosystem. Game-changing stuff!

Quick question — are you open to a quick chat this week to explore how we can leverage our paradigm-shifting platform for your team?

Per my last email — I am also available on LinkedIn DM!

Let's synergize! 🤝

Yabi

metadata.failure_reason: Every possible violation — the LinkedIn roast email
